overview: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT Surat), located in Ichchhanath, Surat, Gujarat, is a premier autonomous public technical institute established in 1961 as a Regional Engineering College (REC). Elevated to an Institute of National Importance under the NIT Act, the institute is known for excellence in engineering, research, innovation, and industry collaboration, particularly in automotive, water resources, and environmental engineering domains.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance under NIT Act; NAAC 'A' Grade accredited; NBA Tier-I accredited core B.Tech programs under Washington Accord standards; Approved by Ministry of Education (MoE) and recognized by UGC.

placements.totalOffers: 591 B.Tech students placed out of 720 appearing students

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions to undergraduate programs are conducted through JoSAA counseling based on JEE Main ranks. Postgraduate admissions are based on GATE, IIT JAM, and CCMT/CCMN counseling procedures.
admissions.importantDates: Follows JoSAA, CCMT, and CCMN national counseling schedules.

campus.hostelFees: ₹12,000 per annum for shared occupancy rooms
campus.specialNote: The institute is recognized as an Anchor Institute in automotive and engineering sectors with strong research infrastructure in environmental and water resources engineering.

scholarships.name: National Fellowship and Scholarship for ST Students
scholarships.benefit: Full tuition and living allowance support

scholarships.name: Dr. A.P. Verma Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Merit scholarship for Mathematics domain toppers

scholarships.name: Mr. Nishith Vijay Sampat Merit Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: Awarded to top-performing Mechanical Engineering students

scholarships.name: M.Tech GATE Stipend
scholarships.benefit: ₹12,400 per month stipend for eligible postgraduate students

contact.address: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Ichchhanath, Surat – 395007, Gujarat, India
